decisions.decision: Insert Phase 9.1 (Library Foundation) before Phase 10 (Library API Completion)
decisions.rationale: pkg/tldt already exists from Phase 8 (08-04-PLAN.md) but CLI still imports internal/summarizer, internal/detector, internal/sanitizer, internal/fetcher directly. Phase 9.1 makes the library load-bearing before Phase 10 adds PII extensions on top.

decisions.decision: Phase 10 plans (10-01, 10-02) use TDD wave structure
decisions.rationale: Wave 1 (10-01): PIIFinding type + DetectPII + SanitizePII. Wave 2 (10-02): Pipeline PII stage. Sequential because Wave 2 needs PIIFinding type from Wave 1 to compile.

decisions.decision: Field mapping: PIIFinding.Line = detector.Finding.Sentence (not .Line — .Line doesn't exist)
decisions.rationale: internal/detector uses Sentence int (repurposed as 1-based line number for PII). Using .Line causes compile error.

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 9.1 to create plans for Library Foundation phase
context_notes: This session: planned Phase 10 (LIB-01–04, 2 plans verified), then inserted Phase 9.1 as prerequisite. Phase 9.1 needs planning. Phase 10 plans are ready to execute after Phase 9.1. No blockers, clean git state.
